pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a recent release compatible with Java 21.
Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern JDKs; using 'release' ensures correct boot classpath and API usage for Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude transitive JUnit dependency from PowerMock to resolve conflicts with modern test frameworks.
Remove PowerMock API dependency which is incompatible with Java 21 due to internal API usage.
pom.xml.why_exists: PowerMock relies on internal JVM APIs (like sun.misc.Unsafe or module system hacks) that are removed or restricted in Java 21, causing runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Byte Buddy version to support Java 21 class file structures.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Byte Buddy may fail to parse or generate classes for Java 21 due to changes in class file format or module system.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito version to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Mockito versions may fail to mock classes or handle proxies correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

src/test/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/test/Organization/OrganizationContro.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3, causing compile errors.
